settings.subtext: The only shop where your true crime obsession finally pays off. Premium gear for real crime fans.

settings.label: 🔍 Evidence Locker
settings.heading: FEATURED SUSPECTS
settings.subtext: Our most-wanted merchandise. High quality prints on every item — because the evidence has to be rock solid.

settings.label: ⭐ Why Choose Us
settings.heading: WHY CRIME SHOPPERS?
settings.subtext: We take merch as seriously as a crime scene investigation.

settings.heading: Free Shipping Over $50
settings.body: No getaway car needed. Orders over $50 ship free anywhere in the US. No minimum detective badge required.

settings.heading: Print-on-Demand Quality
settings.body: Every item printed to order. No warehouses full of evidence. Just fresh, high-quality prints on premium materials.

settings.heading: Ships Worldwide
settings.body: We deliver to 150+ countries. True crime obsession knows no borders, and neither do our shipping routes.

settings.label: 📬 Dispatch
settings.heading: STAY OUT OF JAIL...
settings.body: ...but stay in the loop. Get early access to new drops, exclusive deals, and cold case discounts.
settings.success_message: ✅ You're in! Check your inbox... and your alibi.
settings.disclaimer: No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. We promise not to sell your data to the feds.
